name: cep_exists_order_refire_epoch
drl: rule R when exists E1() P() then end
_finding: D-144 item 1b Family B exists: on a witness-toggle RE-FIRE (E1 leaves then returns), the held P's fire by the D-140 EPOCH model — newest epoch first, the initial epoch LAST. P2(ep1) and P3(ep2) inserted while the witness is absent fire NEWEST-first, the initial P1 last: cycle1 [1], re-fire [3,2,1] => [1,3,2,1]. Engine emitted FIFO here pre-D-144.
